name: s3_text_reader
description: Read a file from S3. Supports text formats (.txt, .md, .csv, .json, .xml, .log, .yaml, .tsv) and PDF files (.pdf, converted to markdown automatically). Returns lines from start_line to end_line. Use this to read documents that the user has provided via S3 file paths.

s3_uri.description: S3 URI of the file to read (e.g., 's3://bucket-name/path/to/file.txt')

end_line.description: Last line to return, inclusive (default 500). Max range is 5000 lines per call.
